title: Opening for Financial Analyst at State Bank of India Digital Technologies
company: State Bank of India Digital Technologies

jsonLd.title: Opening for Financial Analyst at State Bank of India Digital Technologies
jsonLd.description:
Join the State Bank of India Digital Technologies family as a Financial Analyst in Kochi. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About State Bank of India Digital Technologies:
State Bank of India Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Ind AS

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Flexible working hours
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with State Bank of India Digital Technologies!
